input.description: Get updated wave plan after Wave 1 completion

text:
Wave 1 complete — all 4 features released. Here's the full summary:

---

## v17-fleet-foundation — Wave 1 Complete

**Progress: 4/4 released (100%)**

| Feature | Result | What was built |
|---|---|---|
| `fleet-repo-scaffold` | Released | Created `orchard9/sdlc-cluster` repo on Gitea with `.woodpecker.yml`, `README.md`, helm chart skeleton, and pipeline stubs — `helm lint` passes |
| `fleet-helm-chart` | Released | Full Helm chart in `k3s-fleet/deployments/helm/sdlc-server/` — Namespace, ExternalSecret, Deployment (sdlc-server + git-sync sidecar), Service, Ingress with SSE annotation — 10/10 QA tests pass |
| `fleet-secrets-infra` | Released | GCP Secret Manager `sdlc-fleet-gitea` provisioned + ExternalSecret manifest in `k3s-fleet` kustomization — 6/6 QA tests pass |
| `fleet-deploy-pipeline` | Released | `pipelines/deploy-project.yaml` committed to `orchard9/sdlc-cluster` — on-demand idempotent `helm upgrade --install` triggered by `SDLC_PROJECT_SLUG` + `SDLC_REPO` params |

**No remaining waves** — milestone is complete. There are only minor warnings (features missing descriptions) but no blocking gaps.

**Notable decisions made during execution:**
- `fleet-helm-chart` corrected ESO API version from `v1beta1` → `v1` (matching live cluster)
- `fleet-secrets-infra` reused existing `gcp-secret-manager` ClusterSecretStore rather than creating a duplicate
- `fleet-deploy-pipeline` deferred 3 integration tests (cluster install, idempotency, Woodpecker UI) as non-blocking pending the other chart features

| `fleet-helm-chart` | Released | Full Helm chart in `k3s-fleet/deployments/helm/sdlc-server/` — Namespace, ExternalSecret, Deployment (sdlc-server + git-sync sidecar), Service, Ingress with SSE annotation — 10/10 QA tests pass |
| `fleet-secrets-infra` | Released | GCP Secret Manager `sdlc-fleet-gitea` provisioned + ExternalSecret manifest in `k3s-fleet` kustomization — 6/6 QA tests pass |
